ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "ride_date" TEXT /* Date when the ride took place */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team participating */,
  "distance_ridden" INTEGER /* Distance ridden in kilometers */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the ride */,
  "bicycle_class" TEXT /* Class of bicycle used in the event */,
  "sortable_time" INTEGER /* Time converted to a sortable format for efficient sorting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event takes place */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., race, tour) */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_leader" TEXT /* Name of the team leader */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team leader */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Team's website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bicycle_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bicycle class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the bicycle class (e.g., Single, Tandem) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bicycle class */,
  "max_riders" INTEGER /* Maximum number of riders the bicycle can accommodate */,
  "weight_limit" INTEGER /* Weight limit for the bicycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with the result */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the result */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of completion (e.g., FIN, DNF) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the ride */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the ride */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed during the ride */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the participant belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the participant (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event related to the log */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., registration, update) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., participant, organizer, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-role association */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant associated with this role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the participant */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was revoked (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with the data */,
  "average_time" REAL /* Calculated average time for the event */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered in the event */,
  "participation_count" INTEGER /* Number of teams or participants in the event */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Highest speed recorded in the event */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed across all participants */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
